name: @moolam/training-gym
description: Training gym anti-cheat charter: production harness path only; replay parity.

scripts.parity:check: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@moolam/runtime-harness && node scripts/check-replay-parity.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @moolam/runtime-harness run build && pnpm --filter @moolam/learning run build && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/replay_parity.test.ts tests/guidance_episode_tasks.test.ts tests/golden_episode_tasks.test.ts tests/scenario_catalog.test.ts tests/gym_env.test.ts tests/episode_termination.test.ts tests/determinism.test.ts tests/snapshot_store.test.ts tests/fleet.test.ts tests/fleet_deadline.test.ts tests/telemetry.test.ts tests/fleet_telemetry_e2e.test.ts
